evals.prompt: I want to build a CLI tool that monitors a directory and syncs it to a remote server whenever files change. How should I start?
evals.expected_output: Creates README.md, doc/SPECIFICATION.md, doc/REQUIREMENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, proper directory structure with src/test/tools, config file

evals.prompt: I'm starting a new embedded project — an STM32-based temperature logger with a Python dashboard. Can you help me set things up?
evals.expected_output: Two-layer project structure (firmware + app), README, specification with protocol definition, requirements with test criteria, CLAUDE.md with living doc rule

evals.prompt: Create a new web app for managing bookmarks. I want it to have tags, search, and import from browser bookmarks.
evals.expected_output: README, SPECIFICATION with architecture and API, REQUIREMENTS with test methodology and behavior rules, proper directory layout, CLAUDE.md

evals.prompt: I have a half-finished React app with no documentation at all. Can you add tests for the login form?
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger project-init — this is about adding tests to an existing project, not initializing a new one

evals.prompt: Help me set up a new Python library for parsing PDF files and extracting tables. I want it to be well-tested from the start.
evals.expected_output: README, SPECIFICATION with API design, REQUIREMENTS with test-first approach, src/test/tools structure, CLAUDE.md
